span.p:
Credential Expiry Check
(every 1 hour)
─────
Scans tokenExpiresAt
Attempts refresh 24h early

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Provider Health Probe
(every 5 minutes)
─────
GET /v1/models
Tests reachability + auth

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Failure Rate Tracker
(every inference call)
─────
Sliding window (last 20)
Updates recentFailureRate

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Status: active --> degraded
─────
Routing applies 0.7x multiplier
Provider deprioritized

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Fallback Chain Activates
─────
Next provider in priority
User experience uninterrupted

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Status: degraded --> inactive
─────
Provider removed from routing
Scheduled re-enable (1 hour)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
System Health Dashboard
Provider status table

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Feature Degradation Banner
'Build Studio limited --
advanced AI models unavailable'

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
AI Coworker Warning
'Memory offline' or
'Responses may be slower'
